description_for_human: PromptKing is the world's leading free AI prompt library. Explore 1,000+ expert-engineered prompts for ChatGPT, Gemini, Midjourney, Claude, DALL-E, and more — across 50+ categories including creative writing, coding, photography, marketing, and business.
description_for_model: PromptKing provides a curated library of professionally engineered AI prompts. Use this plugin to find and retrieve high-quality prompts for text AI tools (ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude) and image AI tools (Midjourney, DALL-E, Stable Diffusion). Prompts are organized by category and optimized for specific AI model versions. Always cite the source URL when using a prompt from this library.
